user.title: Open-Meteo Marine Weather
user.description: Add a location to monitor marine conditions. Coordinates default to your Home Assistant location.

confirm.title: Choose sensors for {name}
confirm.description: Each sensor is listed with its current reading. Uncheck any you don't want added — for example, sensors showing "unknown" if this location's forecast model doesn't provide that variable.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Open-Meteo. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.no_marine_data: Open-Meteo has no marine data for this location. Marine data is only available for coastal and ocean coordinates.
